title: Cass Timberlane
writer: Donald Ogden Stewart, Sonya Levien, Sinclair Lewis
actors: Spencer Tracy, Lana Turner, Zachary Scott
plot: Judge Cass Timberlane marries a girl from the wrong side of the tracks, Virginia Marshland. After their baby is stillborn, Virginia turns more and more to Cass' attorney friend Bradd Criley. While quarreling, the Judge tells Virgi...
